data.body: As a Christian, I see Jesus as an intervention by God in human history, a catalyst. Other cultures also seem to have been intervened with in ways appropriate to them. I’ve no idea if this is against Kalshi’s TOS and I don’t care to check.

I assume we will run into some scaling issues at some point either in bet size, liquidity, or account. But it’s been fun!
